name: Pull Request
about: Create a PR
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / Workflow
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Affected areas

- [ ] `config/*`
- [ ] `boards/shields/*`
- [ ] `.github/workflows/*`
- [ ] `docs/*`
- [ ] Other:

## Validation

How was this change validated?

- [ ] CI checks passed
- [ ] Local build/test completed
- [ ] Not run (explain why)

Evidence (run links, logs, screenshots, or reasoning):

## Breaking changes

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (describe impact and migration steps)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and excludes unrelated edits.
- [ ] Paths, target names, and artifact names are accurate.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` was reviewed.
